title: IQVIA Holdings (IQV) Surpasses Q1 Earnings & Revenue Estimates
text: IQVIA Holdings (IQV) first-quarter 2023 revenues improve year over year.

title: IQVIA Holdings (IQV) Tops Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: IQVIA Holdings (IQV) came out with quarterly earnings of $2.45 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.41 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.47 per share a year ago.

title: Here's Why Investors Should Retain IQVIA Holdings (IQV) Stock
text: Market size and data reserve are positives for IQVIA Holdings (IQV). Foreign currency risk is bothersome.
